message:
fix: deduplicate blocked-cache batch entries before write

insert_blocked_cache_entries could receive duplicate issue IDs in the
same batch, causing redundant DELETE+INSERT cycles with only the last
value surviving. Add dedupe_blocked_cache_batch() helper that collapses
duplicates (last value wins) before writing, avoiding wasted I/O.

Also add cross-reference comment in resources.rs MCP schema doc linking
title max-length to validation::MAX_TITLE_CHARS.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
